# iosxe_ipv6_local_pool (Data Source)

This data source can read the IPv6 Local Pool configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_ipv6_local_pool" "example" {
  name = "DHCPv6-PD"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) IPv6 local pool name

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `group` (String) Pool group name
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `prefix_length` (Number) Prefix length to assign from pool
- `start_address` (String) IPv6 pool prefix
